text:
root@freebsd:/usr/ports/audio/shorten # uname -a
FreeBSD freebsd.example.com 11.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE #0 r335510: Fri Jun 22 04:32:14 UTC 2018     root@releng2.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

Attached a log file showing build, install and error creating package on a freshly installed 11.2-RELEASE image running under VMWare.
